plan_set_components: Architectural plans — floor plans all levels, sections (minimum 2), elevations all four facades, roof plan, site plan with setbacks
Structural plans — foundation plan and details, framing plan, moment frame connections, structural sections
MEP coordination drawings — electrical single-line diagram and panel schedules, lighting layout with fixture specifications, plumbing and hydraulic layout
Solar PV system drawings — panel layout on roof (HOA-recessed), inverter location, electrical interconnect diagram
Smart home / AV system drawings — structured wiring plan, home automation hub location, device rough-in locations
Irrigation system plan — drip zone layout, controller location, connection to smart home
Detail sheets — wall sections, stair details, roof details (HOA-compliant ridge treatment), window and door openings
Finish schedule — all surfaces, all rooms, all exterior finishes
Door and window schedule with specifications
Built-in furniture drawings — kitchen, master closet, built-in shelving
Final HOA-compliant drawing set bearing Residencial Vista del Mar HOA approval stamp
notes: All 7 systems from engineering-package.json (structural, electrical, lighting, water, irrigation, solar, av) are fully integrated and coordinated in the executive plan set. HOA approval from Residencial Vista del Mar obtained and approval stamp/reference number included on final drawing set. Municipal permit application can now proceed per SOW Phase 6.
